---
name: performance-optimizing
description: Identifies and fixes performance bottlenecks
---

<!-- PromptScript 2026-03-04T21:41:05.478Z - do not edit -->

## Workflow

1. Measure first - Don't optimize without data
2. Find bottlenecks - Profile hot paths
3. Fix biggest issue - 80/20 rule
4. Measure again - Verify improvement

## Quick Wins

1. Add database indexes
2. Enable compression
3. Implement caching
4. Use pagination
5. Lazy load resources
